_doc: Targets for the add-idea / add-skill / add-agent scripts. Edit values marked TODO before first use of the corresponding target.

ideas._doc: Where new ideas land. Always this repo.

skills._doc: Where new skills land. Set 'defaultTarget' to 'github' or 'ado'. Each target has its own block below.

github._doc: Public/personal skills live in their own repo under DDancingDeath. The script creates 'skill-<slug>'.

ado._doc: Internal skills are contributed to a Microsoft ADO repo via PR. Fill in repoName + path on first internal use.

agents._doc: Where new agents land. Same shape as skills.

git._doc: Author identity used for commits created by these scripts.
